title: rubus × conspicuiformis
intro: Rubus × conspicuiformis, also known as the hybrid raspberry or raspberry-blackberry, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Rubus idaeus (wild raspberry) and Rubus fruticosus (blackberry). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus × conspicuiformis include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and jams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
